items.issue: WAYFINDING-MAP may need an equivalent description of the route information.
items.proposed_change: After human review, add a concise text alternative or nearby equivalent route description.
items.verification: A person compares the visible route information with the available text alternative in the rendered page.
items.residual_limitation: A person has not yet inspected WAYFINDING-MAP in the rendered page.

items.issue: SESSION-DETAILS-CONTROL may need an equivalent keyboard activation path.
items.proposed_change: After human interaction testing, use a native button or provide equivalent keyboard activation behavior.
items.verification: A person operates SESSION-DETAILS-CONTROL with keyboard input and confirms the same state change as pointer activation.
items.residual_limitation: A person has not yet interaction-tested SESSION-DETAILS-CONTROL.

affected_users: People who navigate form controls with assistive technology
items.issue: SUPPORT-PREFERENCES-GROUP may need an explicit programmatic group name and relationship.
items.proposed_change: After human inspection, use an appropriate native grouping structure or an equivalent programmatic relationship.
items.verification: A person inspects SUPPORT-PREFERENCES-GROUP in browser accessibility information and confirms the group name and relationships.
items.residual_limitation: A person has not yet inspected the rendered structure of SUPPORT-PREFERENCES-GROUP.
